research_question: Round11b batch03: continue serial-only execution for the full158 remaining queue with the next 12 Alpha158-style atomic candidates.

source_policy.notes: Batch03 follows the same whitelist-only governance.

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: capture asymmetry of short-horizon return distribution
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with project-native pct_ret rolling skewness

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: distribution asymmetry channel differs from dispersion level.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: measure tail-heaviness of short-horizon return distribution
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with project-native pct_ret rolling kurtosis

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: tail-shape statistic differs from downside-volatility share.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: compare short-window gap-return volatility to medium-window baseline
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native gap_ret rolling std windows

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: volatility-ratio form differs from direct stability level.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: compare short-window intraday return volatility to medium-window baseline
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native intraday_ret rolling std windows

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: intraday vol-ratio regime differs from path-efficiency construction.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: position close relative to rolling MA anchor
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with project-native adj_close rolling average

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: price-to-average anchor differs from return-horizon momentum.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: compare short-window mean close to medium-window baseline
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with project-native rolling mean close windows

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: mean-price spread differs from direct return-ratio construction.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: compare short-window turnover mean to medium-window baseline
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with project-native turnover_rate rolling means

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: turnover-ratio regime differs from prior liquidity trend form.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: normalize amount dispersion by rolling amount level
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native log_amount rolling mean/std

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: coefficient-of-variation channel differs from entropy structure.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: compare short-window normalized range to medium-window baseline
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native daily range ratio rolling means

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: raw range-ratio baseline differs from prior compression variant mapping.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: correlation between gap returns and intraday returns
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native gap_ret and intraday_ret correlation

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: correlation form differs from sign-share consistency formulation.

signal_pool.interpretation: higher average close-location value in bar range

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: measure where close sits within daily high-low range
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native OHLC close-location decomposition

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: average close-location channel differs from prior event-conditional close-position constructs.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: compare short-window signed-flow volatility to medium-window baseline
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native signed_amount_daily rolling std windows

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: volatility-ratio channel differs from persistence/autocorrelation channel.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later composability-screening round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that remains weaker at the head slice should be rejected rather than rescued by family tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, stability-cap, overlay, or family-composition changes inside this round.
notes: This batch continues the full158 remaining queue under whitelist-only governance.
